networkfirewall.rulegroup.portrange.CfnA: A single port range specification. This is used for source and destination port ranges in the stateless [AWS::NetworkFirewall::RuleGroup MatchAttributes](aws-properties-networkfirewall-rulegroup-matchattributes.md).

networkfirewall.rulegroup.portrange.From.Description: The lower limit of the port range. This must be less than or equal to the `ToPort` specification.

networkfirewall.rulegroup.portrange.ToPo.Description: The upper limit of the port range. This must be greater than or equal to the `FromPort` specification.
